summary.key_theme: 市場高度關注 Google AI 工具對 Figma 核心業務的潛在威脅，導致股價面臨估值重估與成長動能的質疑。

bullish.title: Figma: Ratings Upgrade After Being Sidelined Since IPO
bullish.reason: 儘管股價低於 IPO 高點，但 Q4 財報顯示成長強勁且 FY2025 財測上調，分析師給予評級升級，顯示基本面仍具韌性。

bullish.title: FIG Stock Outlook: Can AI Credit Monetization Lift 2026 Sales?
bullish.reason: 探討 Figma 如何透過 AI 信用額度變現來提升 2026 年營收，若執行成功將成為股價反彈的關鍵催化劑。

bearish.title: Figma Stock Falls Thursday As Google Expands AI Design Push
bearish.reason: Google 推出 AI 設計工具（如 Vibe Design）直接威脅 Figma 的市場份額，引發投資人對其護城河的擔憂，導致股價顯著下跌。

bearish.title: Figma's Stock Is Trading Like Artificial Intelligence (AI) Will Destroy Its Business. But Is That Really the Case?
bearish.reason: 市場過度反應 AI 對 Figma 商業模式的破壞性，導致股價遭到拋售，反映出投資人對 AI 時代下軟體公司生存能力的極度恐慌。

bearish.title: Figma, Inc. (FIG) Down 6.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
bearish.reason: 自上次財報發布以來股價下跌 6.3%，顯示市場對其獲利能力與成長持續性存疑，短期內缺乏強勁反彈動力。

bearish.title: Figma (FIG) Valuation Check As Shares Struggle And Market Reassesses Growth Versus Losses
bearish.reason: 股價近期下跌 4.1%，市場正在重新評估 Figma 在高成長與持續虧損之間的平衡，估值壓力顯著。

bearish.title: Is It Time To Reassess Figma (FIG) After This Year’s 36.9% Share Price Slide
bearish.reason: 今年以來股價重挫 36.9%，引發關於該股是價值投資機會還是價值陷阱的激烈辯論，顯示市場信心極度脆弱。

bearish.title: Is Figma a Buy? — Optimism about the company has so far not translated into investor gains.
bearish.reason: 指出市場對 Figma 的樂觀預期遲遲無法轉化為實際股價漲幅，顯示投資人對其長期獲利能力的耐心正在耗盡。

neutral.title: FIG vs. ADSK: Which Stock Has an Edge in the Design SaaS Market?
neutral.reason: 將 Figma 與 Autodesk (ADSK) 進行比較，屬於常規的產業競爭分析，未提供具體利多或利空訊號。

neutral.title: Watching Figma; Shares Move Higher; Traders Circulate Post By Google Member Of Technical Staff
neutral.reason: 僅報導因 Google 員工社群貼文提及 Figma 而引發的短期股價波動，屬於市場雜訊，缺乏實質基本面變動。

neutral.title: Figma (FIG) Stock Is Trending After Google's AI 'Vibe Design' Tool Unveiled
neutral.reason: 彙整了 Google AI 工具發布後的股價趨勢，屬於對市場現狀的客觀描述，未包含新的分析觀點。
